ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "nirf_rank" INTEGER /* NIRF rank of the college */,
  "nirf_score" REAL /* NIRF score of the college */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was established */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the college */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details including phone and email */,
  "type_of_institution" TEXT /* Type of institution (Public/Private/Deemed University) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliating body, if any */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "campus_area" REAL /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (Undergraduate/Postgraduate/Doctoral) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "intake_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of students admitted per year */,
  "fee_structure" TEXT /* Annual fee details */,
  "placement_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students placed after completing the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college where the faculty member works */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the faculty member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the faculty member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of research publications */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards or recognitions */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for academic inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructures" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college having the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the infrastructure facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the facility */,
  "type_of_facility" TEXT /* Type of facility (Library, Lab, Sports Complex, etc.) */,
  "year_of_establishment" INTEGER /* Year the facility was established */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational timings of the facility */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Condition of the facility (Good/Fair/Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructures_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)
column_names: State where the college is located
City where the college is located
Official website URL of the college
Contact details including phone and email
Size of the campus in acres
Reference to the college offering the program
Duration of the program in years
Number of students admitted per year
Percentage of students placed after completing the program
Unique identifier for each faculty member
Reference to the college where the faculty member works
Reference to the college having the facility
Type of facility (Library, Lab, Sports Complex, etc.)
